clusters.synthesis: Agent executes actions in the world through a loop, not just text generation.
Engineering role and practice in an AI-native software era.
Scaling model capability through reasoning training and new post-plateau scaling behavior.
Long-term codebase evolution, reliability, and debt management under agent-generated or factory-like development.
Isolated execution environments for safe testing, hardware boundaries, and fleet-level sandbox orchestration.
Protecting agent systems through supply-chain awareness, short-lived credentials, and dependency/provenance risks.
Persisting useful agent state across turns with writable memory, lineage-aware storage, and immutable logs.
Using inner-loop, trigger, benchmark, and domain-specific evaluations to measure agent quality and robustness.
Humans and agents collaborate inside the customer or work context, with agents handling rapid execution and iteration.
Agent harnesses become active systems that initiate work, listen for events, and organize runtimes around tasks and verifiers.
Encoding organizational facts, skills, norms, and grounding data so agents behave correctly.
Using semantic metadata and ontology design to map domain concepts onto systems of record.
Cheaper software creation expands the set of problems people want built.
Collaborative perception by sharing the same screen or interface between human and agent.
Resumable, durable execution as the stable core of an agent system.
A generated site used as a living representation of a person's thoughts, tastes, and work.
Adapting open models for defense through collaboration and post-training.
Selecting sufficiently capable models and harnesses for high-stakes tasks instead of weak wrappers.
Durable AI advantage comes from internal processes, tacit knowledge, and the data model.
Local AI becomes practical when models, harnesses, and specialized distillation improve together.
Model progress understood as discrete eras of capability.
An agent's identity and learning derive from its own accumulated experience.
Using open-weight models as a practical alternative for many production tasks.
A learning technique that uses quizzes to verify genuine comprehension instead of passive reading.

clusters.canonicalTopic: Grief and gain from AI coding
clusters.synthesis: The emotional and professional adjustment to faster, easier coding workflows.
A systems-style way to productize video understanding as reusable infrastructure through memory and harnesses.
Measuring and improving code-to-video systems with benchmarks.
